title: Synthetic face (StyleGAN, AI tier catches)
license: Synthetic — not a real person. StyleGAN-generated images are not copyrighted.

expected_findings.note: Wvolf/ViT_Deepfake_Detection flags as synthetic — one signal among many
expected_findings.caveat: Model trained on FaceForensics++; confidence shown but never used as verdict

demo_narration: Tier 3 is the AI signal. When it agrees with Tiers 1 and 2, the report is consistent. We always present it as one input among many.
